title: [podman-remote] inspect container: display file size by default
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug


**Description**
`podman inspect $ctn` displays file size only when `-s` flag is used. But `podman-remote inspect $ctn` shows the total file size no matter with or without flag `-s`.
<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Set up the environment as the [guide](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/remote_client.md) told me.

2. pull some image on podman node, and run it.

3. inspect the created container both on podman node and the remote node. 
podman node:
`[root@localhost ~]# podman inspect rsyslog > rsyslog_inspect.output`
remote node:
`PODMAN_VARLINK_ADDRESS="tcp:127.0.0.1:1234" bin/podman-remote inspect rsyslog > remote_rsyslog_inspect.output`

4. Copy output of podman node to remote node.
`scp rsyslog_inspect.output root@$remote_ip:~`

4. compare the output on both sides.

**Describe the results you received:**
```
diff -u ~/rsyslog_inspect.output remote_rsyslog_inspect.output                                 master
--- /root/rsyslog_inspect.output	2019-03-26 18:18:13.811056587 +0800
+++ remote_rsyslog_inspect.output	2019-03-26 17:54:26.872751727 +0800
@@ -130,6 +130,7 @@
                 "WorkDir": "/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/aa40d8a09eb77f5d6af676c24bfe8f0676e050ca3b5c8708e6fa35bc5bac4473/work"
             }
         },
+        "SizeRootFs": 223578342,
         "Mounts": [
             {
                 "destination": "/run",
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
There should be no difference between the two ouput files.
